title: Thinking Elixir Podcast
description: The Thinking Elixir podcast is a weekly show where we talk about the Elixir programming language and the community around it. We cover news and interview guests to learn more about projects and developments in the community.Whether you are already experienced with Elixir or just exploring the language, this show is created with you in mind. We discuss community news, Functional Programming, transitioning from OOP, coding conventions, and more.Guests visit the show to help challenge our assumptions, learn about new developments and grow in the process.Subscribe to join us on this journey!
